title: Create Train Resync
description: Various fixes and tweaks for the niijima-railways modpack.
body:
![Fix create mod issue#5997](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/6tVUzKA6/images/0788c68fcddf233e0ddd002efda7168af36328d9.png)This mod includes various fixes and tweaks for the niijima-railways modpack.

Currently, it does 7 things:

- Fix [create](https://modrinth.com/mod/create) mod [issue#5997](https://github.com/Creators-of-Create/Create/issues/5997) (dirty, temporary fix).
- Implement create mod [PR#9357](https://github.com/Creators-of-Create/Create/pull/9357) with mixin to backport to 0.5.1.j.
- Adapt [pantograph&wires](https://modrinth.com/mod/create-pantographs-and-wires) mod to count trains under wire as “fueled”.

Version 1.5.0.d (30 Oct 2025):

- Make lumisene bucket from [supplementaries](https://modrinth.com/mod/supplementaries) compatible with liquid engine from [simple planes](https://modrinth.com/mod/simple-planes)

Version 1.5.1.a (12 Nov 2025):

- Suppress [this](https://github.com/ProgrammerLP/Create-Train-Lights/blob/57180e7f3dcb5b82c9a7405f5a32e9f259e47604/common/src/main/java/net/adeptstack/ctl/behaviours/movement/HeadTailLightMovementBehaviour.java#L72)

Version 1.6.0.a (22 Jan 2026):

- Suppress the [double-portal](https://github.com/Creators-of-Create/Create/blob/23deea6cacaa7cafaabcaf60d49cebfce99ee44c/src/main/java/com/simibubi/create/content/trains/entity/TrainStatus.java#L100) warning message

Version 1.6.0.b (06 Feb 2026):

- Improve the vanilla NAN rotation error for entities to be more readable
